snippet: Create React App deprecation is the React ecosystem's Y2K. Thousands of production apps need migration. The pain is underestimated by the community.
author: victor@mastodon.social

snippet: Spent 2 weeks migrating a CRA app to Vite. 40% of the pain was in environment variable handling. CRA and Vite have completely different env conventions.
author: wendy@mastodon.social
